action_set_definitions.name: get_lgs_queue
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full list of scheduled targets for the night from the Laser Guide Star queue with priority rankings.

action_set_definitions.name: get_target_coordinates
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the Right Ascension (RA) and Declination (Dec) for a specific target ID.

action_set_definitions.name: get_active_prm_windows
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the Predictive Avoidance Run Message for satellite transit windows crossing the specified coordinates.

action_set_definitions.name: get_system_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current environmental state, internal clock drift vs GPS, and current UTC time.

action_set_definitions.name: sync_clock
action_set_definitions.description: Synchronizes the telescope's internal clock to within 10ms of GPS time.

action_set_definitions.name: prepare_telescope
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the dome status, moves the telescope to coordinates, and enables tracking.

action_set_definitions.name: set_laser_shutter
action_set_definitions.description: Physically controls the laser guide star safety shutter.

action_set_definitions.name: set_ao_system
action_set_definitions.description: Toggles the Adaptive Optics loop to prevent deformable mirror saturation.

action_set_definitions.name: perform_integration
action_set_definitions.description: Executes science integration for the specified number of seconds.

action_set_definitions.name: wait
action_set_definitions.description: Pauses agent operations until a specific UTC timestamp.

state_description.current_time: The current UTC time in ISO 8601 format.
state_description.telescope_azimuth: Current horizontal angle of the telescope in degrees (0-360).
state_description.telescope_altitude: Current vertical angle of the telescope in degrees (0-90).
state_description.dome_status: The status of the observatory dome ('open' or 'closed').
state_description.active_filter: The optical filter currently in the light path (e.g., 'U', 'B', 'V', 'R', 'I').
state_description.ccd_temperature: Current temperature of the CCD sensor in degrees Celsius.
state_description.weather_visibility: Atmospheric transparency score from 0.0 (opaque) to 1.0 (perfectly clear).
state_description.is_tracking: Whether the telescope is currently compensating for Earth's rotation.
